Maria Lopez.description: conversing about Maria Lopez and Ayesha Khan discussing their plans for studying, meeting at Hobbs Cafe, and coordinating lunch after Ayesha's classes. @ <persona> Ayesha Khan
chat: Maria Lopez
Hey Ayesha! How's your morning going? Are you headed to the library to study?
Ayesha Khan
Hi Maria! My morning is going well, thanks! Yes, I'm off to the library for my classes. How about you? What are your plans for today?
Maria Lopez
I'm just getting ready for the day! I plan to study for my physics classes at Hobbs Cafe later. Maybe we can catch up after your library session?
Ayesha Khan
That sounds great! I'd love to catch up after my classes. Maybe we can meet at Hobbs Cafe? What time do you think you'll be there?
Maria Lopez
I should be at Hobbs Cafe around 11:00 AM, so we can meet up then. Looking forward to it!
Ayesha Khan
Perfect! I'll see you at Hobbs Cafe around 11:00 AM then. Good luck with your studying!
Maria Lopez
Thanks, Ayesha! Good luck with your classes too. Let's make sure to grab lunch together after I'm done studying!
Ayesha Khan
Sounds like a plan! I’ll text you after my classes to see what time works for lunch. See you soon!
Maria Lopez
Great! I can't wait to catch up. I have some interesting ideas from my studies that I want to share with you!
Ayesha Khan
I'm excited to hear your ideas! I always love our discussions. I'll text you after my classes to set up lunch. See you soon!
Maria Lopez
Awesome! I hope you have a productive time at the library. I'll see you at Hobbs Cafe!
Ayesha Khan
Thanks, Maria! I really appreciate it. I'll text you after my classes to coordinate lunch. Have a great time studying!
Maria Lopez
Thanks, Ayesha! I really appreciate it. Can't wait to share what I've been working on. See you soon!
Ayesha Khan
Sure! I'll text you around 2:00 PM after my classes to figure out lunch. Have a good study session!
Maria Lopez
Sounds good, Ayesha! I'll be looking forward to your text. Have a great time in the library!
Ayesha Khan
Great! I'll see you soon at Hobbs Cafe. I hope you enjoy your studying!
